texto: I don't think I could play a character that I couldn't relate to somehow. I'm not unfamiliar with frustration, anger, shame, helplessness and a load of other emotions that make up our psycho-soup. I try to focus on that frustration, that sense of unfairness, and multiply it.
explicacao: Citação de Terry O'Quinn sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't think I could play a character that I couldn't relate to somehow. I'm not unfamiliar with…” articula reflexao, character, focus em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como focus.
